creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #6)

Oops, forgot, note also that Assignee doesn't mean one needs to fix the problem. Think of it as 'issue champion/coordinator'.

That can take the form of ushering the docs change (a differential review), finding an alternative software or asking 'not crappy C devs or ports people' what a fix might look like :)
